title: JobMatch
description: Structured output produced by the job_extract prompt (plan §14 Phase 4). Generated JSON must match this schema exactly; extra properties are rejected by the Pydantic mirror in app.llm.schemas.JobMatch. Numeric salaries must be accompanied by a verbatim comp_phrase that the backend regex-corroborates against the source email body before writing the row — fabricated salaries fail the guard and are dropped.

title.description: Role title copied verbatim from the posting.

location.description: Free-text location (city / region / country). Null if the posting does not state one.

remote.description: Tri-state: true when remote is explicitly offered, false when on-site-only, null when ambiguous.

comp_min.description: Inclusive lower bound of the salary range in currency units.

comp_max.description: Inclusive upper bound of the salary range in currency units.

comp_phrase.description: Verbatim salary phrase copied from the email body. Required when comp_min or comp_max is set.

seniority.description: Normalized seniority tier; null when the posting does not state one.

source_url.description: Apply / posting URL lifted from the email body or headers.

match_reason.description: One-paragraph rationale for why this posting is or is not a fit. Encrypted at rest.

confidence.description: Calibrated probability the extracted fields are faithful to the email. Rows below 0.7 are suppressed from the digest by the pipeline policy gate.
